name: linkedin-post-writer
description: Convert blog posts to native LinkedIn posts (text + 7-10 slide carousel), 2026 algorithm-optimized. 12 hook formulas, Depth Score validator (>=80 gate), Link-in-Comment automation (avoids 60% reach penalty), MixPost OSS integration for auto-publishing, Telegram 15-min cancel window. Built on 127-source RAG research.
